description: Use this API to modify or add new GIC User 1D Earth Model data to the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.8.0. ierr = gic_earth1d_usr(name,desc,realar,layers,rho,thickness)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: 1d earth model name. the non-blank alphanumeric identifier assigned to earth model. the name should be unique and different than standard earth model names defined in tpl-007. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: desc
parameters.description: Earth model description. it is used for information purpose only.. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: layers
parameters.description: Number of layers of earth model rho and thickness. (input).

parameters.name: rho
parameters.description: An array of layers elements specifying array of ‘layers’ values specifying earth model layer resistivity in ohm-m. All values must be > 0. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: thickness
parameters.description: An array of layers elements specifying array of ‘layers’ values specifying earth model layer thickness in km. All values must be > 0 except last layer. The last layer thickness is infinity, specified as any number < 0. . (input; no default allowed).

realar.description: Benchmark event scaling factor (1.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘beta’.
Supplemental event scaling factor (1.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘betas’.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
